title: Studio
description: The top-level container for a creative AI studio. A studio defines agents, artifact types, stores, playbooks, quality criteria, and knowledge - everything needed to describe how creative work is done.

description.description: Description of what this studio does and its creative domain

version.description: Semantic version of this studio definition

constitution.description: Inviolable principles all agents must follow

agents.description: Agents that can perform work in this studio

entry_agent.description: The agent that interfaces with external customers. Must reference an agent with is_entry_agent=true.

artifact_types.description: Types of artifacts that can be created in this studio

asset_types.description: Types of binary assets that can be stored in this studio

stores.description: Storage locations for artifacts and assets

playbooks.description: Playbooks defining how work flows through the studio

tools.description: Tool definitions available to agents. Capabilities in agent.schema.json grant permission to use these tools; this array defines the tool interfaces.

quality_criteria.description: Quality criteria used to validate work

default_store.description: Default store for artifacts without a specified store

max_rework_cycles.description: Default maximum rework cycles for playbooks

default_quality_criteria.description: Quality criteria applied by default to all work

flow_control.description: Settings for managing agent mailbox overflow and backpressure

flow_control_settings.description: Flow control settings to prevent mailbox overflow and context explosion. The Runtime uses these to implement the Secretary (auto-summarization), Bouncer (backpressure), and TTL (expiration) patterns.

max_inbox_size.description: Maximum messages shown in an agent's context. Beyond this, oldest messages are summarized into digests.

auto_summarize_threshold.description: When inbox exceeds this count, trigger automatic summarization of older messages into a digest.

max_active_delegations_per_agent.description: Maximum concurrent delegations an agent can have. New delegations are rejected (backpressure) when exceeded.

default_message_ttl_turns.description: Default turns before ephemeral messages expire. Delegations never expire; clarifications and progress updates may.

authors.description: People who created this studio definition
